source.business_scenario: 嵌套子查询触发多次 broadcast
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT c.first_name,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental r WHERE r.customer_id = c.customer_id) AS cnt
FROM customer c
WHERE c.active = 1
LIMIT 20
